description: Reference manifest for the published OvCa enhancer-activity figures. Output paths point into project_data/ (never duplicated). When a reviewer runs the FR-4 oracle on the same code+inputs, the comparator should report MATCH against these files.

software.note: Pipeline published with the SBATCH-pinned versions: R 3.5.1, bowtie2 2.3.4.3, samtools, cutadapt, fastx-toolkit. See Lib4_all_steps_FINAL_111525.sbatch:62 for the canonical version pins.

parameters.note: Source of truth for these parameters: ovarian_cancer_specific_enhancer_screening_analysis.R lines 59-67, 215.
